summary:
I've found and fixed the issue. The problem was in the pagination logic of the Flask application. There was an incorrect offset calculation in the `list_products()` function of `app.py` which caused a page boundary error. The original code had an unnecessary adjustment to the offset for page numbers greater than 1.

I edited the code to use the standard offset calculation formula `(page - 1) * per_page` and ran the test script again. The test now passes, confirming that the pagination across page boundaries is correct.
